scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @kittywallet/shared-types && npm run build -w @kittywallet/shared-api && npm run build -w @kittywallet/shared-utils
scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspaces --if-present
scripts.dev:backend: npm run build:packages && npm run dev -w @kittywallet/backend
scripts.dev:frontend: npm run build:packages && npm run dev -w @kittywallet/frontend
scripts.type-check: npm run build:packages && npm run type-check --workspaces --if-present
scripts.db:setup: npm run docker:db && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
